file_insights.changes_summary: Added comprehensive inline documentation explaining all configuration choices and their rationale

documentation_coverage.universal_defaults: Documented charset, line endings, whitespace handling with rationale
documentation_coverage.language_specific: Added detailed comments for Kotlin, XML, Gradle, JSON, YAML, and Markdown sections
documentation_coverage.references_added: Included link to Kotlin coding conventions and references to standards (POSIX, YAML spec)

key_additions: Explanation of encoding choice (UTF-8 for internationalization)
Rationale for LF line endings (prevents git issues)
File-type specific rationale (e.g., 2 spaces for JSON/YAML is community standard)
Special handling notes (e.g., Markdown trailing whitespace preservation)

patterns_discovered.description: Comments follow logical grouping: global purpose → root settings → universal defaults → file-type specifics
Simple settings (charset) get brief explanations; complex ones (line length) get detailed rationale
Each setting includes both 'what it does' and 'why we chose this value' comments
Documentation frequently references official standards (Kotlin guide, YAML spec, POSIX) to justify choices
Comments emphasize consistency benefits across editors and team members

gotchas_discovered.issue: Trailing whitespace is typically trimmed but Markdown uses it for line breaks
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Setting 'trim_trailing_whitespace = false' for Markdown with explanatory comment

gotchas_discovered.issue: Different languages have different community standards (4 spaces vs 2 spaces)
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Documented rationale for each choice to justify variance from baseline

gotchas_discovered.issue: Different file types benefit from different line length limits
gotchas_discovered.resolution: 120 chars for code (practical compromise), off for Markdown (prevent URL breaking)

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Tools using Groovy vs Kotlin DSL
gotchas_discovered.issue: Gradle has two syntax variants with different conventions
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Separate sections with comments clarifying legacy vs modern approach

approach_outcome.scope: Complete documentation of all 12+ configuration rules with contextual explanations

recommendations.suggestion: Add version information for referenced tools and standards
recommendations.rationale: Helps teams identify when documentation might need updates (e.g., 'Kotlin 1.7+ conventions')

recommendations.suggestion: Document any intentional deviations from official standards
recommendations.rationale: Explains why 120 chars instead of 100, or other custom choices made by the team

recommendations.suggestion: Consider adding comments about per-file exceptions if they exist
recommendations.rationale: Prepares developers for potential project-specific overrides

recommendations.suggestion: Link to IDE-specific setup guides for EditorConfig support
recommendations.rationale: Helps new team members ensure their editors are properly configured
